description.ko: 생물학과 기술이 하나로 융합된 세계를 탐험해 보세요. FLORA-9은 식물이 코드와 빛으로부터 자라나는 시뮬레이션된 자연 서식지를 보여주며, 포스트 유기체 시대의 매혹적인 네온 야생 지대를 선사합니다.
description.en: Explore a world where biology and technology become indistinguishable. FLORA-9 showcases a simulated natural habitat where plants grow from code and light, creating a mesmerizing neon wilderness in a post-organic era.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a futuristic digital garden. Bioluminescent translucent flowers with pulsing fiber-optic veins, holographic leaves shimmering in iridescent colors, and floating data particles like golden pollen. The background is a surreal landscape of liquid crystal rivers and silicon mountains under a star-filled nebula sky. 8k resolution, ray-tracing, ethereal lighting, high-tech aesthetics.
